'''Junction V''', or '''Junction 5''', was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Lorian Nod]].

==History==
The people of Junction V and [[Delaluna]] made peace shortly before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and joined with the people of [[Vicondor/Legends|Vicondor]] and [[Bezim]] to build the [[Station 88 Spaceport]]. This coalition of planets chose to remain loyal to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

{{Planet-stub}}
